# Nayu Technologies

> Nayu Technologies empowers enterprises with intelligent automation, generative AI, and IT services. We specialize in digital transformation for Fortune 500 companies and Canada's Big 5 banks.

## Core Expertise
- [Generative AI Consulting](https://nayutechnologies.com): Implementation strategies for LLMs and autonomous agents in financial services.
- [Intelligent Automation](https://nayutechnologies.com): Streamlining enterprise workflows using AI-driven process automation.
- [IT Services](https://nayutechnologies.com): High-scale infrastructure and modern IT solutions for regulated industries.

## Targeted Industries
- **Banking & Finance:** Specialized solutions for Canada's Big 5 banks.
- **Enterprise:** Scalable IT and AI integration for Fortune 500 organizations.

## Contact & Engagement
- [Book a Consultation](https://nayutechnologies.com): Schedule a free strategic session for AI and automation.
- [About Nayu](https://nayutechnologies.com): Our mission, leadership, and experience in the Canadian financial sector.

## Optional Reference
- [Technical Blog](https://nayutechnologies.com): Latest insights on AI trends and automation case studies.
